calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2017 Off Calendar

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Advanced From Jun-06-17 To Jun-02-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL
Off Calendar Jun-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF HOWARD GREEN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL is GRANTED. Mr. Green has shown good cause to set aside the dismissal with prejudice per CCP 473(d). "[A] dismissal with prejudice disposes of the client's substantive rights and therefore requires for its validity the authorization of the client." (Romadka v. Hoge (1991) 232 Cal.App.3d 1231, 1236.) Mr. Larsen filed a declaration stating that he did not have authority from Mr. Green to file a dismissal with prejudice. The court credits Mr. Larsen's declaration in light of the circumstances that Mr. Green sought to revive, and the court vacated the dismissal of, his earlier filed and substantively identical case (case 547848) on April 10, 2017. Moreover, the earlier case was revived prior to the dismissal with prejudice is now set aside. Because the filing of the dismissal with prejudice was Mr. Larsen's fault, defendants Royal Food Store and Kim Moc Huynh are entitled to fees and costs and are awarded $1,350.00 in attorneys' fees and costs as amounts that were reasonably incurred. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene Tofft, CSR # 12313 =302/hk
